pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DG-K-011 (Data Governance/Knowledge) scores 0.428 composite (highest: NICE at 0.428). Scope is edge_case for Clinical AI Specialist: 1 in-scope signals, 0 out-of-scope signals. Seniority is appropriate.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, Data Governance, composite 0.428. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Data Governance for Clinical AI Specialist at this seniority?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Data Governance appears in ~40% of Clinical AI Specialist postings as a secondary competency. Healthcare data governance appears as supporting competency in senior clinical AI profiles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Data Governance with role-relevant signals (1) is market-supported. Final decision: include.
